MACRO_DASHBOARD.SceneControl.Title: Macro Dashboard
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Window.Dashboard.Title: Macro Dashboard
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Window.Library.Title: Macro Library
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Tab.ConfirmDelete.Title: Delete Dashboard?
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Tab.ConfirmDelete.Conten: Delete {name}? Tiles inside will be lost. This cannot be undone.
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Empty.NoDashboards.Title: No Dashboards Yet
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Empty.NoDashboards.Hint: This scene has no dashboards. Click the + tab above to add one, or create a global dashboard.
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Empty.NoTiles.Hint: Drag macros from the Macro Library here. Right-click any tile to edit, duplicate, or delete it.
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Library.GroupsComingSoon: Preset groups are coming in v0.2.
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Settings.AutoSwitch.Name: Auto-switch with scene
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Settings.AutoSwitch.Hint: When enabled, the dashboard automatically follows the currently viewed scene. When disabled, the GM can pick any scene from a dropdown.
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Settings.TileSize.Name: Tile size
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Settings.TileSize.Hint: Size of macro tiles on the dashboard canvas.
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Settings.Layout.Name: Layout
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Settings.Layout.Hint: Free-grid (snap-positioned tiles) or columns (auto-binned by stripe color).
MACRO_DASHBOARD.Notification.MacroMissin: Macro no longer exists. Right-click the tile to remove it.
